display.purpose: Hero and section headlines on marketing surfaces. Ceiling ~4rem.

numeral.purpose: KPI figures and progress counts. Always Inter, never the Arabic body face.

body.purpose: Running text, bilingual RTL/LTR. Cap measure 65-75ch.

shadows.name: elevation-1
shadows.purpose: Raised cards on the dark skin.

motion.name: glass-spring
motion.purpose: Default spring for hover lift and interactive transitions.

motion.name: glass-ease
motion.purpose: Softer ease for surface and opacity transitions.

motion.name: gold-focus-pulse
motion.purpose: Signature single-halo attention ring. No bounce. Reduced-motion: static ring.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold pill CTA on the dark marketing skin; tactile hover lift.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--gold, #C8A652); color: var(--background, #0F0F0F); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; min-height: 44px; padding: 0.875rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--gold-hover, #B8963E); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200,166,82,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action; raised surface with a hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: var(--surface, #1A1A1A); color: var(--foreground, #F5F0E8); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; min-height: 44px; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--surface-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: var(--gold, #C8A652); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200,166,82,0.4); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Raised content surface on the dark skin; tonal separation, hairline edge.
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--surface, #1A1A1A); color: var(--foreground, #F5F0E8); border: 1px solid var(--surface-border, #2A2A2A); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.125rem; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-card p { color: var(--muted, #9C9488); font-size: 0.9rem; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text field; gold focus border and ring.
components.css: .ds-input { background: var(--surface-light, #222222); color: var(--foreground, #F5F0E8); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.625rem 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--input-border, #333333); border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted, #9C9488); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--gold, #C8A652); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(200,166,82,0.25); }

components.name: KPI Numeral
components.description: Progress figure; forced Inter so Latin digits stay crisp.
components.css: .ds-kpi { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-kpi-num { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 48px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--data-progress, #34D399); } .ds-kpi-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted, #9C9488); }

narrative.overview: furqan is gold on near-black — brand gold (#C8A652) resting on a deep #0F0F0F ground, the way illuminated Qur'anic calligraphy sits on aged vellum. The system is reverent before it is anything else: the subject is sacred, so every choice favours the dignified over the clever. Warmth is carried by a single warm metal and a soft gold radial glow, never by bright colour or busy ornament — premium, refined, calm. It runs in two registers under one identity: a dark marketing skin (gold-on-black manuscript) and a light app-shell (white surfaces, gold darkened to #8A6D1A for AA, student dashboard repointed to a calm blue). It rejects the generic SaaS dashboard, childish gamified edtech, cold clinical fintech, and the cluttered ornate religious-web look.
keyCharacteristics: Gold-on-near-black as the signature; one warm metal carries the identity.
Reverent and calm — dignity over decoration, space over density.
Bilingual by design: full RTL/Arabic is first-class, not a translation layer.
Contrast-tuned to WCAG AA across three skins (dark, light, student-blue).
Tactile, confident components on a Liquid-Glass surface vocabulary.

rules.name: The One Metal Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only brand colour. It is never joined by a second decorative hue on the same surface; blue, emerald and violet are scoped functional accents (a skin, a data type), never co-stars.

rules.name: The Gold-As-Text Rule
rules.body: Brand gold #C8A652 is the manuscript ground on the dark skin; on the light app-shell it is reserved for interactive and accent use (focus rings, links, primary actions, borders) and never a general background. As body text it only appears on dark (>=4.5:1); on any light surface gold text becomes Ink Gold #8A6D1A.

rules.name: The Bilingual-First Rule
rules.body: Every type choice must render correctly in Arabic RTL and Latin LTR. A font or size that only works for one script is not shipped.

rules.name: The No-Kicker Rule
rules.body: No tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section, and no 01/02/03 numbered markers as default scaffolding. Hierarchy comes from the Rakkas display scale.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Glare Rule
rules.body: On dark, reach for tonal layering and the gold glow before a hard shadow. Heavy black drop-shadows on the manuscript ground read as cheap; the light does the lifting.

dos: Do keep gold as the one brand metal; let blue, emerald, and violet stay scoped functional accents, never co-stars.
Do darken gold to Ink Gold #8A6D1A for any text on a light surface (AA).
Do pair the Rakkas display serif against the Plex/Inter sans on a real contrast axis; hold the display ceiling at ~4rem.
Do convey depth on dark with tonal steps and the gold glow first.
Do make every surface render correctly in Arabic RTL and Latin LTR.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every animation, including the gold pulse (it becomes a static ring).
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS dashboard — no hero-metric templates, gradient blobs, or identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't drift childish / gamified — no mascots, confetti, or bright cartoon primaries.
Don't go cold / clinical / corporate — no sterile fintech navy or austere impersonal grids.
Don't clutter into a busy ornate religious site — no dense text walls or dated Islamic-web ornament.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders (border-left >1px as a colored accent), or a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every section.
Don't put brand gold #C8A652 as text on white, or heavy black drop-shadows on the dark manuscript ground.
